channel.title: llm on Things I have seen
channel.description: Recent content in llm on Things I have seen

item.title: Comparing LLMs for quotidian tasks
item.description: Comparing LLMs for quotidian tasks GitHub Copilot recently moved to usage based pricing, and we see our costs rising significantly, especially for outlying users. This inspired me to compare performance across some different LLMs and harnesses as we decide how to allocate spending in the coming months. The task Not every task requires the highest level of intelligence. For this test, I wanted to choose something that should not require a huge context window or run for multiple hours.

item.title: Retrieval Augmented Generation
item.description: I want to implement a RAG system that will index a set of documents and then answer questions based on them. My plan is to use our ISO27001 ISMS documents to answer security questions from suppliers. The basic plan was Build it inside docker Use Langchain to make it all work Use ElasticSearch for the retrieval part Use Open AI API initially, but hopefully a local LLM in the future Here is the GitHub repo
